title: [BUG] Dates are not correct when loading files saved in "Strict Mode"
author: jec006

comments.author: hugo082
comments.body:
Hii @jec006 👋 

Any chance to see the PR merged? What are the next steps?
I would be happy to help if needed

_Edit:_ the project seems inactive: https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/2764

comments.author: suuunly
comments.body:
Heard anything back on this issue?
Since not being able to read dates makes this package unusable when it comes to working with dates 😅

comments.author: jec006
comments.body: Hi, I haven't heard anything back and don't have the ability to merge.  I've taken to just using this commit and doing a git reference for this package

comments.author: suuunly
comments.body:
It is very unfortunate that they haven't labelled the project as shelved, since a lot of people will hop into using it, without knowing these underlying bugs that will not get fixed 🫠
But thank you for your insight! I will do the same then, and find a different library in future prospects 😁
